title: Grit Studio Run Attribution Report Boundary
forbids: Studio Run in Game attribution assembly or diagnostics-section wiring outside the private runtime diagnostics/reporting boundary
why: Packet 13 makes attribution one private report assembled from the operation's source, manifest, generation, deployment, observation, and terminal records. Runtime workspace files are evidence from behavior/live gates; source authority is the diagnostics/reporting boundary that builds and links the report behind explicit lookup.
remediate: Keep attribution report assembly in the Studio server runtime diagnostics/reporting boundary, write it before diagnostics are marked available, include it only through diagnostics sections, and rely on the closed public status authority rule for public projections.
message: Studio Run in Game attribution report boundary drifted.
